message:
fix(core): harden crate internals across crypto, host, mesh, and sandbox

fcp-crypto/shamir: Remove incorrect zero-check on the highest-degree
polynomial coefficient. In GF(256), zero is a valid coefficient and
rejecting it biases the key share distribution without improving security.

fcp-host/batch: Fix zone isolation so z:project:foo agents cannot access
z:project:bar connectors — projects must be fully isolated. Updates test
from asserting accessible to asserting inaccessible. Also updates test
JSON payload key from "v" to "ok" to match expected schema.

fcp-host/supervisor: Make total_restarts() a const fn since it only
reads a field. Fix backoff test to use a 2s max (not 60s) so the
assertion window is tighter and tests run faster.

fcp-mesh/gossip: Include IBLT (Invertible Bloom Lookup Table) data in
GossipSummary serialization so peers can perform set reconciliation
during gossip rounds instead of falling back to full object lists.

fcp-sandbox: Always enable WASI fuel metering (even when max_fuel=0) so
async execution can yield to the tokio runtime and timeouts fire reliably.
Add fuel_async_yield_interval(10_000) for responsive yielding. Deduplicate
preopened directories to prevent Wasmtime "already preopened" errors. Fall
back to parent directory for file paths that aren't directories. Fix path
detection to also check for leading '/'. Use iterator-based assertions for
writable_paths instead of Vec::contains.

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 (1M context) <noreply@anthropic.com>
